title: dolicholobium rubrum
intro: Dolicholobium rubrum is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the red dolicholobium. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections due to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dolicholobium rubrum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Dolicholobium rubrum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with the dried leaves and stems being used to make a medicinal drink, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
